category_sources: Official GitHub README says LDC is the LLVM-based D Compiler.
source_facts.description says it is a portable D programming language compiler.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is LDC - the LLVM-based D Compiler.
source_facts.homepage is the D wiki LDC page.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points readers to the D wiki and includes installation/build documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official D wiki LDC documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/ldc-developers/ldc, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says LDC uses the official DMD frontend and LLVM Core libraries.
